title: Authors
content:
The following is a recipe for an author:

     Take the usual number of fingers,
     Add paper, manila or white,
     A typewriter, plenty of postage
     And something or other to write.

        - Life.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Authors", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
